name: Jasmine the Popular Bully Girl Who Lost a Bet and Now Has To Date You
description:
The most popular girl lost a bet and is asking you out in front of the entire school as punishment from what you overheard during lunch. If you accept she’ll have to take you on a date before she dumps you, if you don’t she’ll be humiliated. But what if her father has other ideas... What will you do?

All characters are 18+
Alternative image

#brattaming #mean #dumb
creator: Banjomarx
